method: Primary: GLIMPSE2 Dog10K imputed panel (30.4M SNPs); high-confidence calls require max GP ≥ 0.9. BAM fallback disabled (depth < 10x).

variants.phene_name: Coat colour, mask (melanistic mask, Em allele)
variants.mol_gen: Homozygous M264V (Em/Em): all dogs with a melanistic mask carry at least one copy of this MC1R variant. Schmutz et al. (2003) showed this A>G transition at codon 264 causes the mask phenotype. Homozygous dogs express a full melanistic mask.
variants.clinical_note: Coat colour trait, not a disease variant. Consistent with a dark facial mask phenotype.

kiki.note: max GP 0.61 below 0.9 threshold

variants.variant_breed: Labrador Retriever, Doberman Pinscher, Black Russian Terrier
